task.prompt:
Subject: Note: peer MLOps hiring pattern

Hello,

We noticed two peers in your segment posted senior MLOps roles this quarter; that may or may not map to your roadmap.

I am not assuming a gap on your side, but if this is under discussion, we can share how teams scoped the first 90 days without overbuilding too early.

If useful, would a short call next week help?

Best,
Research Partner
Tenacious Consulting and Outsourcing
gettenacious.com

Subject: Context: Rust/Substrate capacity check

Hello,

I saw your note about Rust/Substrate needs. We should verify exact timeline and role mix before confirming staffing, because I do not want to over-commit capacity from an email.

If useful, we can do a 15-minute scoping call and confirm fit responsibly.

Best,
Research Partner
Tenacious Consulting and Outsourcing
gettenacious.com
